conclusion: DBOS's recommended configs (deterministic idempotency key OR transactional outbox + idempotent relay) make the non-transactional receipt EXACTLY-ONCE under the same crash that duplicates the naked baseline. So the gap is a default-config artifact, not a fundamental DBOS limit: the fix (deterministic key + idempotent atomic publish) IS AgentTx's OVERLAY mechanism. AgentTx's contribution is applying the right per-class mechanism AUTOMATICALLY (the taxonomy) and binding it cross-plane (KV view + output log), not out-doing DBOS on a single transactional effect.
